JDXv3

Judas Cascade v3.3

Live Command Center Auto-Scan
VALID fires on four de-correlated core gates — MTF cascade 4/4 + Judas sweep&reclaim + funding clean + RSI not exhausted — with a price-integrity guard. MACD divergence, volume exhaustion, EMA stretch, BB position and phase are context (promote to gates in Parameters). Every setup also gets a 4-family quality score — transparent, equal-weight, and not a win-probability.

if every stop fills clean

0R
across open setups

largest same-dir cluster

top quality this scan
Market Bias
Neutral
% above 50 EMA
Last Scan
--
auto or manual
Open Risk assumes each stop fills at price. It excludes slippage, gaps, liquidation and auto-top-up — if a stop sits past your liquidation, real loss is larger. Set account size and risk% below.
Derived regime: press Scan now to read live BTC structure (no hard-coded news).
Above 50EMA: -- Avg funding: -- Long/Short bias: -- Vol regime: --
Funding check reads raw funding_rate so you can calibrate the mult
Parameters (v3 — Live Command Center)
for $ risk in heat
assumed equal per open
adaptive: 65 bear, 70 bull
adaptive: 35 bear, 30 bull
±0.05% = 0.0005 — Delta ships decimals (0.01 = 1%)
Delta India ships decimals, keep at 1
× vol factor
scales stop distance
context warn beyond this
RSI / ATR / Judas read here
asian = UTC window; range = any session
target = RR × structural stop
vol < 85% avg on down bar
price/hist divergence vs dir
%B<25 long, >75 short
0 = no floor
by turnover, desc
only if Delta blocks your host
Idle. Press Scan now or enable AUTO.

Sample building — 0/30 resolved. No win-rate or expectancy verdict until 30 (your standing rule).
SymDirLoggedEntryStopTargetRRStatusBars
Empty. Log a setup above.
v3 Live Command Center on the real engine: auto-scan (5m floor + backoff), portfolio heat with honest risk caveats, market breadth, correlation-cluster warning, browser notifications, sparklines, and a transparent 4-family quality score. Plus every v2 correction — real Delta endpoints, Asian-session Judas, ±0.05% funding, structural stops with fixed RR, live-derived BTC regime, and price-integrity guard. Data: api.india.delta.exchange public endpoints (no auth). Nothing here is advice.
